mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}

SELECT p.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM favorite f JOIN post p ON f.post_id = p.id JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}
